ns0:entry.ns0:title: HariSekhon/DevOps-Bash-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HariSekhon/DevOps-Bash-tools
Language: shell
1000+ DevOps Bash Scripts - AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, APIs, SQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Hive, Impala, Kafka, Hadoop, Jenkins, GitHub, GitLab, BitBucket, Azure DevOps, TeamCity, Spotify, MP3, LDAP, Code/Build Linting, pkg mgmt for Linux, Mac, Python, Perl, Ruby, NodeJS, Golang, Advanced dotfiles: .bashrc, .vimrc, .gitconfig, .screenrc, tmux..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ophub/fnnas
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ophub/fnnas
Language: shell
Supports running FnNAS on Amlogic, Allwinner, and Rockchip devices. Support a311d, s922x, s905x3, s905x2, s912, s905d, s905x, s905w, s905, s905l, rk3588, rk3568, rk3399, rk3328, h6, etc.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yohey-w/multi-agent-shogun
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yohey-w/multi-agent-shogun
Language: shell
Samurai-inspired multi-agent system for Claude Code. Orchestrate parallel AI tasks via tmux with shogun → karo → ashigaru hierarchy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/youngyangyang04/leetcode-master
Language: shell
《代码随想录》LeetCode 刷题攻略：200道经典题目刷题顺序，共60w字的详细图解，视频难点剖析，50余张思维导图，支持C++，Java，Python，Go，JavaScript等多语言版本，从此算法学习不再迷茫！🔥🔥 来看看，你会发现相见恨晚！🚀
